name: tensor-dtype-native-ops-inversion
description: Invert wrapper pattern for parametric tensor operations: make Tensor[dtype] typed implementations the core, with runtime-typed AnyTensor dispatching via ordinal table. Use when: (1) migrating from runtime-typed to compile-time typed tensor ops, (2) eliminating dtype branching and bitcasts from hot paths, (3) designing a 3-layer architecture (AnyTensor API -> dispatch -> typed core).
